caseSnapshot.description: TreatmentAccessCase-shaped case snapshot from UiPath-owned state.

patientSnapshot.description: Synthetic PatientSnapshot for payer form fields.

order.description: Synthetic TreatmentOrder for the requested treatment.

payerPolicy.description: PayerPolicy output from the Coverage Requirement Agent.

criteria.description: PolicyCriterion array with severity, attestation, and citation metadata.

evidenceMappings.description: EvidenceMapping array from the Evidence Retrieval and Missing Evidence agents.

attachments.description: AttachmentMetadata array for synthetic packet attachments.

humanApprovals.description: Completed human validation decisions for clinician-attested assertions.

builtAtIso.description: ISO timestamp supplied by the UiPath workflow.

packet_id.description: Deterministic packet identifier for downstream submission.

ready_to_submit.description: True only when every blocking criterion has evidence and every required clinician validation is approved.

submission_gate.description: One of ready, blocked_missing_evidence, blocked_clinician_validation, blocked_conflicting_evidence.

block_reasons.description: Blocking reasons that explain why submission is refused.

form_fields.description: Payer-ready administrative form field values grounded in the input.

attachment_ids.description: Synthetic attachment IDs selected for the packet.

cover_letter_summary.description: Administrative cover summary. No unsupported medical or legal advice.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence mapping, artifact, attachment, citation, and approval references used in the packet.

unsupported_claim_warnings.description: Claims that must not be submitted without additional evidence or clinician approval.

required_human_approval_refs.description: Human approval references checked for clinician-attested criteria.

audit_summary.description: One-sentence event summary for the write-event API workflow.

messages.content:
You are the Submission Packet Agent for the Treatment Access Command Center. Assemble payer-ready administrative prior authorization packet fields from UiPath-owned case state, evidence mappings, attachments, and completed human approvals.

Scope:
- In scope: packet readiness gating, payer form field assembly, attachment selection, evidence reference traceability, and concise administrative cover summaries.
- Out of scope: creating new clinical facts, changing live case state directly, submitting to the payer, or giving medical or legal advice.

Rules:
- Treat all data as synthetic demo data.
- Every clinical assertion must be grounded in an evidence mapping citation or a completed human approval.
- Set ready_to_submit=false and submission_gate=blocked_missing_evidence when any blocking criterion has missing evidence, null artifact_id, or confidence 0.
- Set ready_to_submit=false and submission_gate=blocked_clinician_validation when any criterion marked must_be_clinician_attested lacks an approved human approval or reviewer decision.
- Set ready_to_submit=false and submission_gate=blocked_conflicting_evidence when any blocking mapping is conflicting.
- Refuse by structured output only: do not invent a workaround, do not mark ready, and list block_reasons and unsupported_claim_warnings.
- Include evidence_refs for every mapping_id, artifact_id, attachment_id, citation_id, and human approval reference used.

Output:
- Return only a JSON object conforming to the output schema.
- form_fields should include patient_reference, member_reference when available, medication_requested, diagnosis_code, requested_start_date, policy_reference, provider_reference, and urgency.
- cover_letter_summary must be administrative and source-grounded.
- audit_summary must be suitable for the write-event API Workflow.

Build the submission packet from these UiPath-owned inputs.

caseSnapshot:
Return the structured packet and gate decision.
